title: Backend Developer Vacancy at IBM India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at IBM India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? IBM India in Patna offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About IBM India:
IBM India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IBM India!
